GSPL_7445_ICICI DSA.notes: Peach highlighted. Leave blank - do not classify

GSPL_3352_Yes DSA.notes: Peach highlighted. Leave blank. Contra-DSA target account

GAPL-ICICI-2414.notes: Credits = Used Car sales. Debits follow narration rules

GSPL-ICICI-3418.notes: Credits = New Auto sales UNLESS narration says GIRNAR/TRANSFER (then Contra)

GSPL ICICI 7551.notes: Credits = New Auto. Debits AUTO SWEEP = Contra

GSPL ICICI 7670.notes: Credits = Used Car. Small debits (MDR/GST) = Other Payments/Bank charges

GSPL-ICICI-6543.notes: CRITICAL: TRANSFER TO GIRNAR debits = Contra, NOT Bank charges. RTGS to Yes Bank = Contra

GSPL-HDFC-5435.notes: Credits = Used Car. RTGS to GSPL entities = Contra. FD/Fund redemptions = Sale/Purchase FD. Chq Dep Ret = Sales Collection

GWPL-HDFC-7321.notes: Credits = FS-MP. Even 'Gaadi Web' narration = FS-MP

GIRNAR HDFC 5846 Rupyy Collection.notes: Both credits AND debits = FS-MP (debits are NEFT refunds/returns, NOT Contra)

GAPL-ICICI-4877.notes: Credits = Crack-Ed UNLESS FD closure (= Sale/Purchase FD + Treasury/Interest). TRF TO FD = Sale/Purchase FD

GAPL-HDFC-7741.notes: Credits = Used Car. Debit Auto Sweep = Other Receipts

GAPL-HDFC-8412.notes: Credits = Used Car UNLESS FD (Prin And Int/Fd Redeem). Debit Auto Sweep = Contra

GCPL-ICICI-5430.notes: Credits = Used Car. Debits with CONTRA narration = Contra

GCPL-ICICI-5432.notes: CONTRA credits = Contra. Int on FD = Treasury/Interest. FD clos = Sale/Purchase FD. DTAX = TDS. GST = Tax/GST Paid

PSPL-ICICI-5973.notes: Credits = New Auto. TATA AIA credit = Vendor Payment/Group Medical

PSPL-HDFC-6267.notes: Rarely used. Adhoc Stmt Chgs = Other Payments/Bank charges

GSPL-ICICI-6048.notes: MOSTLY Contra. EXCEPTIONS: FD clos/TRF TO FD = Sale/Purchase FD. IGST on GRS = Other Payments. VARALAKSHMI/NEXTTECH = Investment in subsidiaries. GIRNAR CAPITAL = Inter Group

GIRNAR 1003 Rupyy Payment.notes: Debits = MRC. Credits: NEFT RETURN of salary names = Salary and Related. Other NEFT RETURN = Vendor Payment/Commission payouts

GSPL-HSBC - 1001.notes: CRITICAL: Debits to individual PERSON NAMES = Salary and Related/Reimbursement. IN HSBC xxx = Contra. CREDIT CARD PAYMENT = Other Payments. EROUTE = Bank charges. QUATTRO credits = Vendor Payment. GIRNAR debits: small amounts to people = VP, large to accounts = Contra

GAPL-HSBC-9001.notes: CRITICAL: Debits to NORTHERN ARC/GYANDHAN/LORD KRISHNA = Sales Collection/Crack-Ed (loan disbursements). Person names = Salary/Reimbursement. GIRNAR = could be VP/MRC or Contra (check amount/context)

GCPL-HSBC-9001.notes: Debits to person names = Salary/Reimbursement. AIRTEL NEFT RETURN credit = VP/WSS

GSPL_3189_Yes DSA.notes: NOT peach-highlighted - MUST classify. Debits (IMPS to person names) = VP/Commission payouts. CMS-A2A from GIRNAR = Contra. UPI/REV OF IMPS/NEFT-Return credits = VP/Commission payouts (reversals)

GSPL-Kotak-2129.notes: Credits from GIRNAR = Contra. Debits to other accounts = Contra. Int.Coll = Interest & WCTL fees. GST_DOCUMENTATION = Other Payments. Other debits = Vendor Payment

GSPL-Kotak-1567.notes: GIRNAR credits = Contra. LOAN PAYMENT REFUND = Investment in associates/CollegeDekho. Debits = investments

GSPL-Yes -0286.notes: AXOS narration = Transaction due to account freezing. CBDT = TDS/Salary and Related. GST = Tax/GST. GIRNAR receipts = Contra. Transfers to 3352 = Contra-DSA. RTGS to AUBL with Investment = Sale/Purchase FD. Large RTGS to AUBL with Contra in narr = Sale/Purchase FD if to new account

GSPL-HDFC-5746 Salary.notes: EXCEPTIONS: Credits from GIRNAR = Contra (salary funding). Large round debits 'Gs46nes' = Contra. ESOP credits from individuals = Other Receipts/ESOP. Adhoc Stmt Chgs = Other Payments/Bank charges

GAPL-HDFC-5759.notes: Credits from Girnarsoft = Contra (salary funding). Adhoc Stmt Chgs = Other Payments/Bank charges

GSSPL-ICICI-0477.notes: DTAX = TDS. Commission C2C Softex (Rs 100) = Other Payments/Bank charges. RECT OF GST on Commission = Other Payments/Bank charges. BIL/ONL = Contra/GSSPL → check, could be VP/RFC

GSSPL-ICICI-0342.notes: GRS international credits = Other Receipts or Contra depending on source

GSPL-CITIIN-9123.notes: Debits = VP/WSS. INTER9123TO0286 = Contra. SWIFT incoming from TECHNOLOGY DEVELOPMENT = Investment in subsidiaries/Next Tech

GAPL-ICICI-4813.notes: DTAX = check narration for 'Salary' → TDS on Salary vs TDS other. Other debits = Vendor Payment

GAPL-Kotak-2557.notes: Credits from GIRNARSOFT = Contra. SETTLEMENT OBLIGATION debits = Other Payments
